text.value: Did CHV have the positive attitude towards client throughout the session ? (calmness, eye contact,language, and smile, not interrupt activities of clients)
Please observe and note down if chv was able to interact well with the client during the visit .
Was CHV kind and smiled towards the client ?
Was CHV llooking sat the client and paying attention througout the visit?
Was CHV calm throughout the visit?
Was CHV interrupting activities of the client?
Did CHV communicate effectively with clients? (Congratulates when a positive results after physical examination, encourage discussion where appropriate)
Did CHV answer concerns and questions from clients? (knows when to refer to heath facility or supervisor)
Did CHV ask for consent from client?

As a supervisor, please be an example by taking all the precautionary measures against infectious diseases when you visit your CHVs. Please remember to use sanitizer and wear mask throughout the visit.
Precautionary measures when visiting a client
Was CHV able to read the pregnant woman/child's clinic card correctly?
Did CHV enter data correctly as provided by client?

Did CHV validate responses to questions that can be verified by asking the mother or Child's health card, or through visual inspection? (e.g newborn fast breathing, place of birth, at the time of data collection)
If the CHV needs any support from HPU, CHMT or D-Tree, then please share their phone numbers and ask the CHV to call them immediately after the visit.
Document the support provided to the CHV based on your observation.
Does CHV counsels or refers the client to facility?
Does CHV asks screening question for this problem?
Does the CHV ask screening questions, and if yes, counsel or refer for the following problems:
Does the CHV demonstrate then observe and coach the caregiver in practicing play and communication activity with child ?
Does the CHV conduct a screening of milestones for age?
Does CHV counsels or refers the client to facility?
Does CHV asks screening question for this problem?
Does CHV counsels or refers the client to facility?
Does CHV asks screening question for this problem?
Does CHV counsels or refers the client to facility?
Does CHV asks screening question for this problem?
Does CHV counsels or refers the client to facility?
Does CHV asks screening question for this problem?
Did CHV provide visit summary, appreciation to client and promise to come next visit?
Did CHV encourage all clients to speak?
Contact ID of the logged in user
Facility ID for the parent user
Name of the logged in user
Did CHV introduce themselves and visitor(s), the program, their role and working tools?
Did CHV take precautionary measures when visiting a client-CHV by staying one meter from the client?
Did CHV take precautionary measures? ( not touch the client when doing physical examinations without sanitizing /washing hands before and after)
What are areas for improvement identified during this visit?

Before filling out this section of the form, please ensure that you sit down with the CHV and discuss areas where CHV did not perform well during the visit. After that outline a plan of resolving the challenges encountered and kindly give feedback where appropriate.
What progress made since the last CHV visit?
Did you receive any support from HPU, CHMT, or Dtree in resolving CHV's challenges?
Did CHV explain the purpose of the topic/session?
How many times did the CHV visit you in the past year?
Ask the CHV to step out before asking the following questionsto the client.
When a CHV visited, what were the questions about ?
Did CHV assess all questions related to danger signs?
Did CHV encourage the client to visit the facility/take the child to the facility after identification of danger sign?
Did CHV navigate in the application, follow instructions, submit forms and sync data?
Did CHV use job aids effectively? (Bango kitita, play &communication actively guide)
Did CHV do a recap of the previous visit?
Je, CHV ana mtazamo chanya juu ya hali ya mteja ? (yaani hamkatishi tamaa, hamuogopeshi au kumtishia mteja wakati wa tembeleo).
Tafadhali chunguza na onyesha jinsi CHV alivoweza kuchangamana na mteja wakati wa tembeleo.
Je, CHV alikuwa na lugha au tabasamu nzuri kwa mteja?
Je, CHV alimuangalia mteja na kusikiliza kwa makini muda wote wa tembeleo?
Je, CHV alikuwa mtulivu wakati wote wa tembeleo?
Je, CHV alikuwa anakatisha kazi za mteja?
Je, CHV anayo mawasiliano mazuri na wateja? ( anampongeza mteja anapopata matokeo chanya baada ya uchunguzi, anahimiza majadiliano yanapohitajika)
Je CHV ameweza kutatua na kujibu maswali ya mteja? ( anajua ni wakati gani wa kumpa mteja rufaa kwenda kituo cha afya au kwa msimamizi)
Je, CHV ameomba idhini kutoka kwa mteja?

Kama msimamizi wa wahudumu wa afya ya jamii, tafadhali kuwa mfano kwao kwa kuchukua tahadhari zote juu ya magonjwa ya kuambukiza pindi ukitembelea wahudumu wako. Kumbuka kutumia kitakasa mikono na kuvaa barakoa muda wote wa tembeleo.
Hatua za kuchukua pindi unapoenda kumtembelea mteja wako
Je, CHV amepima kwa usahihi kipimo cha MUAC?
Je, CHV ameweza kusoma kadi ya kliniki ya mama mjamzito/ mtoto kwa usahihi?
Je, CHV ameingiza taarifa za mteja kwa usahihi?

Je, CHV ameweza kutumia kadi ya mtoto au vithibitisho vingine ili kuthibitisha majibu yaliyotolewa na mama ? Majibu kama kupumua kwa haraka kwa mtoto mchanga, mahali alipo zaliwa nk yanahitaji CHV kuthibitisha kwa kuangalia kadi, kuchunguza kwa macho nk.
Ikiwa CHV atahitaji msaada wowote kutoka kwa HPU, CHMT au D-tree, tafadhali toa namba zao za simu na kumpa CHV na muhimizie CHV kuwapigia simu punde tu atakapomaliza kufanya tembeleo hili.
Andika usaidizi aliyoupata CHV kwa mujibu wa mtazamo wako.
Je, CHV anamshauri mteja na kumpa rufaa?
Je, CHV anauliza maswali ya uchunguzi?
Je, CHV anauliza maswali ya uchunguzi, na ikiwa ndio, je anatoa ushauri na anampa rufaa kwa ajili ya kupata msaada zaidi katika maeneno yafuatayo:
Je,CHV anamuelimisha kwa vitendo mzazi, ikisha anamuangalia mzazi jinsi ya kuwasiliana na kucheza na mtoto?
Je, CHV hufanya uchunguzi wa hatua muhimu kwa kwa ukuwaji na maendeleo ya mtoto kulingana na umri?
Je, CHV anamshauri mteja na kumpa rufaa?
Je, CHV anauliza maswali ya uchunguzi?
Je, CHV anamshauri mteja na kumpa rufaa?
Je, CHV anauliza maswali ya uchunguzi?
Je, CHV anamshauri mteja na kumpa rufaa?
Tatizo:Hawana muda wa kucheza na mtoto wao
Je, CHV anauliza maswali ya uchunguzi?
Je, CHV anamshauri mteja na kumpa rufaa?
Je, CHV anauliza maswali ya uchunguzi?
Maswali kuboresha huduma za makuzi na malezi awali ya mtoto
Je, CHV ametoa muhtasri wa tembeleo, shukrani kwa mteja na kuahidi kurudi kwenye tembeleo linalofuata?
Je, CHV amewahimiza wateja wote kushiriki mazungumzo?
Je, CHV amejitambulisha mwenyewe pamoja na majukumu yake, wageni walioko pamoja naye, ametambulisha mpango wa jamii ni afya na vifaa vya kutendea kazi?
Je, CHV amechukua tahadhari za kujikinga na maambukizi ya ugonjwa wakati wa kumtembelea mteja? ( amekaa umbali wa mita moja kutoka kwa mteja)
Je, CHV amechukua hatua za tahadhari za kujikinga na maambukizi ya ugonjwa? ( ametumia kitakasa mikono/kunawa mikoni kabla na baada ya kumfanyia mteja uchunguzi)
Ni maeneo gani uliyoyatambua wakati wa tembeleo yanayo hitaji maboresho zaidi?

Kabla ya kujaza sehemu zifuatazo, hakikisha unakaa chini na CHV na kujadili maeneo yote ambayo CHV hajafanya vizuri wakati wa tembeleo lako. Baada ya hapo weka mpango mkakati wa kutatua changamoto zilizojitokeza na ahidi kurudisha mrejesho pale ikibidi.
Ni maenedeleo gani yaliyofanywa na CHV ukilinganisha na tembeleo lililopita?
Je, CHMT, HPU au D-tree wamekuwa msaada katika kutatua changamoto za CHV?
Je, CHV ameeleza malengo ya tembeleo?
Ni mara ngapi ulitembelewa na CHV huyu?
Muombe CHV atoke nje kidogo kabla ya kumuuliza mteja masuali yafuatayo.
Je, alikuuliza masuali gani wakati alipokutembelea?
Je, CHV ametathmini maswali yote yanayo husu dalili za hatari?
Je, CHV amemuhimiza mteja kutembelea kituo cha afya/kumpeleka mtoto kituo cha afya baada ya kugundua daliliza za hatari?
Je, CHV anatumia simu na kufuata maelekezo ya kwenye simu , amewasilisha fomu na kusawazisha taarifa?
Je, CHV anatumia visaidizi vya kazi sawa sawa ? ( bango kitita, michezo na miongozo ya mawasiliano)
Je, CHV amerudia kukumbusha kuhusu tembeleo lililopita?
